name: Marcus Webb
bio: Met freshman year in the dorms. We road-tripped across three states after graduation. He's now an architect in Portland — always building something new.

name: Priya Nair
bio: Former manager who became a genuine friend. She recommended the book that changed how I think about careers. We trade reading lists every month.

name: Daniel Osei
bio: We've known each other since third grade. Grew up on the same street. He lives in London now but we still play games online every couple of weeks.

name: Sofia Martínez
bio: We bonded over a study abroad program in Spain. She's a travel photographer now — her Instagram is stunning. I always mean to call more often.

name: James Callahan
bio: Neighbor turned best friend. We train for half-marathons together. He's the person I call when something goes wrong — always picks up.

name: Aisha Okonkwo
bio: Our families were close growing up. She's a ceramic artist in Brooklyn and one of the most thoughtful people I know. I've been terrible at keeping in touch.

name: Ryan Nguyen
bio: Met at a hackathon five years ago. We've collaborated on side projects ever since. He just launched his second startup — always has something cooking.

name: Leila Ahmadi
bio: Roommates for two years in college. She taught me how to actually cook. Now she runs a small catering business. We try to do a video call dinner once a month.
